texto: It is a narrow policy to suppose that this country or that is to be marked out as the eternal ally or the perpetual enemy of England. We have no eternal allies, and we have no perpetual enemies. Our interests are eternal and perpetual, and those interests it is our duty to follow.
explicacao: Citação de Lord Paulmerston sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “It is a narrow policy to suppose that this country or that is to be marked out as the eternal all…” articula reflexao, bias, judgment em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como judgment e prejudice.

frase_original: It is a narrow policy to suppose that this country or that is to be marked out as the eternal ally or the perpetual enemy of England. We have no eternal allies, and we have no perpetual enemies. Our interests are eternal and perpetual, and those interests it is our duty to follow.
